introSection: Fiorano GT Challenge (Arabic: تحدّي فيورانو جي. تي) is a steel launched twin roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. The roller coaster features multiple LSM launches. The three cars have been designed to mimic Ferrari F430 Spiders.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Fiorano GT Challenge (Arabic: تحدّي فيورانو جي. تي) is a steel launched twin roller coaster located at Ferrari World Abu Dhabi in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. The roller coaster features multiple LSM launches. The three cars have been designed to mimic Ferrari F430 Spiders.



3 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.
